ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wireless_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wireless network standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the wireless network standard (e.g., 802.11a, 802.11b) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency band of the standard (e.g., 2.4GHz, 5GHz) */,
  "typical_throughput" REAL /* Typical throughput of the standard in Mbps */,
  "max_bandwidth" REAL /* Maximum bandwidth of the standard in Mbps */,
  "range_indoor" INTEGER /* Typical indoor range of the standard in meters */,
  "range_outdoor" INTEGER /* Typical outdoor range of the standard in meters */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* Current version of the standard */,
  "standard_status" TEXT /* Status of the standard (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the standard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the standard was last updated */,
  "security_features" TEXT /* Security features supported by the standard */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Typical power consumption of devices using this standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wireless_standards_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("frequency") REFERENCES frequency_bands ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wireless network standard the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Typical throughput, Maximum bandwidth) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., lab test, real-world data) */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES wireless_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency band */,
  "band_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency band (e.g., 2.4GHz, 5GHz) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency band */,
  "band_status" TEXT /* Status of the frequency band (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "band_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the frequency band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, IT professional, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the user account was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wireless network standard accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES wireless_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wireless network standard covered in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the performance report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES wireless_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wireless network standard the visualization is for */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "viz_content" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "viz_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "viz_format" TEXT /* Format of the visualization (e.g., PNG, SVG) */,
  "viz_size" INTEGER /* Size of the visualization file in bytes */,
  "viz_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES wireless_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., standard, admin) */,
  "permission_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the permission */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., network engineer, IT professional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  "expired_date" TEXT /* Date the role assignment will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a wireless network standard */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wireless network standard */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the standard */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standard_versions_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES wireless_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standard_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the standard that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "change_status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "change_source" TEXT /* Source of the change (e.g., user, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standard_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES standard_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wireless network standard supported by the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the device was released */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "device_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context for the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "device_software_version" TEXT /* Current software version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_devices_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES wireless_standards ("standard_id")
)
